title: Cribl Worker Group
description: A Cribl worker group or edge fleet that organizes nodes and deploys shared configurations for processing observability data at scale.

id.description: Unique identifier for the worker group or fleet

description.description: A human-readable description of the group purpose

isFleet.description: Whether this group is an edge fleet rather than a stream worker group

workerCount.description: Number of connected worker or edge nodes in this group

configVersion.description: The currently deployed configuration version identifier

tags.description: Key-value tags for organizing and categorizing groups

provisioned.description: Whether the group has been provisioned and is ready to accept nodes

cloud.description: Cloud-specific configuration for Cribl Cloud deployments

region.description: The cloud region for the worker group
